title: Training Algorithms Path
description: Build fluency in Training Algorithms inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Truncated Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT)
steps.summary: Truncated Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Start after Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT) and Truncated BPTT.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Backpropagation
steps.summary: Backpropagation belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Compare it with Gradient Backpropagation and Deferred Backpropagation. It opens into Deferred Backpropagation and Gradient Backpropagation.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Perceptron Learning Algorithm
steps.summary: Perceptron Learning Algorithm belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Start after Perceptron and V-Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Memory-Efficient Backpropagation
steps.summary: Memory-Efficient Backpropagation belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Start after Backpropagation and Memory network.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Truncated Backpropagation Through Memory
steps.summary: Truncated Backpropagation Through Memory belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Start after Backpropagation and Memory network.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT)
steps.summary: Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT) belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Start after Backpropagation. It opens into Truncated Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Gradient Backpropagation

steps.title: Truncated BPTT
steps.summary: Truncated BPTT belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Training Algorithms. It sits inside Neural Networks / Training Algorithms. Compare it with Truncated Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT) and Truncated SVD. It opens into Truncated Backpropagation Through Time (BPTT).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
